description: التحقق من مسار Chrome العادي وملفات تعريف المستخدم المتاحة
command_preview:
# Check if Chrome is available and get user profile path
$chromePath = 'C:\Program Files\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe'
if (-not (Test-Path $chromePath)) { $chromePath = 'C:\Program Files (x86)\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe' }
if (-not (Test-Path $chromePath)) { $chromePath = (Get-ItemProperty 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\App Paths\chrome.exe' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).'(Default)' }
$profilePath = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\Google\Chrome\User Data"
Write-Output "Chrome path: $chromePath"
Write-Output "Chrome exists: $(Test-Path $chromePath)"
Write-Output "Profile path: $profilePath"
Write-Output "Profile exists: $(Test-Path $profilePath)"
# List Chrome profiles
if (Test-Path $profilePath) { Get-ChildItem $profilePath -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -match
output:
